originalAlarm.description: `__curr_1644` could be null (null value originating from line 2574) and is dereferenced.

sanitizedDescription: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 2574) and is dereferenced.
reasoning: Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_104. curr from malloc() at L65 can be NULL, dereferenced at L67 (curr->next = head) without NULL check. No // ERROR at L67, new bug. Bug fires in all configs. PC = !CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES is over-constrained — the bug fires regardless of SORTFILES.
